narration: Here. Autonomous vehicle session. Operator blamed the tunnel. But evidence converges across four artifacts in the first second — RTK was already dead forty-three minutes before tunnel entry. The tunnel could not cause a state that already existed.

second_finding_modifiers.narrative_center: contradiction + convergence, not asymmetry; stronger than block_05 because it overturns a human explanation
second_finding_modifiers.operator_theory_presentation: beat A presents the tunnel theory neutrally (not pre-rejected) so the refutation in beats B-D lands
second_finding_modifiers.convergence_visual: 2x2 grid of four artifact cards in the first second; MUTED_AMBER kind-label + ACCENT timestamp; staggered reveal 0.3s/0.75s/1.2s/1.65s
second_finding_modifiers.temporal_contradiction: beat D horizontal timeline shows full 3626s span with MUTED_RED persistence band + ACCENT marker at 0.24s + neutral FG marker at 2606s; explicit 43-minute bracket
second_finding_modifiers.lockup_restraint: no BUG/FIX hero, no diff payoff — preserves block_08's climax; uses the refutation phrase from hypothesis #5 in the real report
second_finding_modifiers.amber_discipline: ACCENT on (a) session duration + timestamp hero, (b) convergence verdict pill, (c) final lockup second line only
